name: Shougang Concord Grand (Group) Limited
summary: Shougang Concord Grand (Group) Limited, an investment holding company, provides finance leasing and other financial services in Mainland China and Hong Kong. It operates through three divisions: Finance Leasing and Other Financial Services, Property Leasing and Building Management Services, and Assets Management. The company offers finance leasing for various sectors, including energy, transport, printing equipment, medical equipment, scientific and technical equipment, industrial equipment, etc. It is also involved in the investment, leasing, sale, and management of properties, such as industrial, office, and residential buildings; provision of property consultant, administrative and management, and referral and corporate financial advisory services; and investment and management of industrial funds. Shougang Concord Grand (Group) Limited has a strategic cooperation agreement with Jingdong Digits Technology Holding Co., Ltd. for cooperation in the field of supply chain business. The company is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. Shougang Concord Grand (Group) Limited is a subsidiary of Wheeling Holdings Limited.
